prompt:
A glass savings jar on a desk or shelf partially filled with stylized dUSD coin tokens and a few folded digital-looking "notes," with a subtle holographic label on the jar showing a generic savings icon instead of readable text. Next to the jar, a notebook page or tablet screen displays a simple progress ring or bar with a goal marker, indicating that the user has started setting aside part of their daily basic income for future plans. Nearby, a small plant and warm lighting make the scene inviting.

Near-future solarpunk home or studio aesthetic with wooden surfaces, soft light, and hints of sustainable tech or greenery in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering with no brand logos or legible writing on the jar or screen. The composition should strongly evoke “start a savings jar with your dUSD” and feel optimistic and forward-looking.
